name: Blockscout
description: Retrieve enriched address details and transaction history across Blockscout-supported EVM chains.

auth.hint: Create a Blockscout PRO API key and send it in the apikey query parameter.

tools.name: get_address
tools.description: Retrieve enriched information about an address on a supported EVM chain.

params.name: chain_id
params.description: Supported EVM chain identifier, such as 1 for Ethereum or 8453 for Base.

params.name: address_hash
params.description: EVM address with 0x prefix followed by 40 hexadecimal characters.

tools.name: list_address_transactions
tools.description: List decoded transactions for an address on a supported EVM chain.

params.name: chain_id
params.description: Supported EVM chain identifier, such as 1 for Ethereum or 10 for Optimism.

params.name: address_hash
params.description: EVM address with 0x prefix followed by 40 hexadecimal characters.

params.name: block_number
params.description: Keyset cursor block number copied from next_page_params.

params.name: index
params.description: Keyset cursor transaction index copied from next_page_params.

params.name: items_count
params.description: Keyset cursor item count copied from next_page_params.
